decks.notes: The deck focuses on creating a powerful combo with Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to generate a large number of tokens and pump them up quickly. It also includes Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End for added power and disruption. The deck utilizes a mix of control elements like Warping Wail and removal spells like Kozilek's Command to survive until the combo can be assembled. The land base includes Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to help ramp up and find key pieces of the combo.

This deck focuses on playing aggressively and quickly, utilizing cards that can deal damage efficiently and maximize card advantage. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Slickshot Show-Off, while also having cards like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to control the board and remove threats. The deck also includes spells like Expressive Iteration and Founding the Third Path to help dig for key cards and keep the pressure on the opponent. With a mix of burn spells, card draw, and efficient creatures, this deck aims to win the game swiftly.

The deck focuses on using various spells and creatures to quickly reanimate powerful creatures from the graveyard, such as Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, and control the game through disruption with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation. Through the combination of instant reanimation and combo pieces like Ephemerate and Faithful Mending, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats while maintaining control of the game. Additionally, the deck includes a variety of lands to support its color requirements and maximize consistency in executing its game plan.

This deck focuses on utilizing creatures with different abilities to generate value and disruption, while also leveraging combo pieces like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Malevolent Rumble to create powerful board states. The toolbox aspect comes from cards like Green Sun's Zenith, Chord of Calling, and Spymaster's Vault to tutor for specific creatures as needed. The inclusion of cards like Grist, the Hunger Tide and Yawgmoth, Thran Physician allows for synergy and combo potential within the creature base. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through creature interactions and combo potential.

This Modern aggro deck focuses on generating aggressive early game pressure with efficient creatures like Territorial Kavu, Ragavan, and Scion of Draco. The deck also utilizes powerful support cards like Leyline of the Guildpact and Lightning Bolt to control the board and maintain tempo. The inclusion of Leyline Binding helps to lock down opponent's threats, while Stubborn Denial provides additional protection for your creatures. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the diverse color requirements of the deck, allowing for consistent and explosive plays.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to maintain board presence early with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride, while also using burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to clear the way for attacks. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide additional firepower and resilience. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm to control the opponent's board. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and disruption, this deck aims to deliver quick and decisive wins.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast and aggressive creatures and direct damage spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. With cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls providing early pressure, backed up by burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, this deck aims to close out games swiftly. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide additional threats and ways to finish off the opponent. The deck includes some control elements with Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining its aggressive strategy.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on mana disruption and aggressive creature plays to control the game. Using cards like Boom/Bust and Cleansing Wildfire to disrupt opponent's mana base, the deck aims to close out the game quickly with creatures like White Orchid Phantom and Magmatic Hellkite. By using cards like Path to Exile and Solitude for removal, and Price of Freedom for card advantage, the deck aims to overpower the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and artifact synergies to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Urza's Saga, Mox Opal, and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck can generate value and tempo advantage while also applying pressure on the opponent. Cards like Kappa Cannoneer and Arcbound Ravager provide additional threats and modular abilities. The deck aims to establish a board presence quickly and disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Pithing Needle and Metallic Rebuke.

This deck focuses on utilizing the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Mine, Tower, and Power Plant) to generate a large amount of mana quickly in order to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger. The deck also uses control elements such as Karn, the Great Creator, Chalice of the Void, and Thought-Knot Seer to disrupt the opponent's game plan and keep the board under control. Overall, the strategy of this deck is to establish a dominant board presence while limiting the opponent's options through control elements.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting opponent's game plan with a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and hand disruption. The deck also leverages threat cards like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to apply pressure once the opponent's resources are depleted. The combination of card advantage, removal, and threats allows the deck to control the game and ultimately win through overwhelming the opponent with efficient and powerful spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures. By taking advantage of cards like Mishra's Bauble, Urza's Saga, and Mox Opal, the deck can quickly generate mana and play powerful threats like Arcbound Ravager and Kappa Cannoneer. By combining artifact creatures with removal spells like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke, the deck can control the game and ensure a swift victory through relentless aggression and efficient use of its key artifact synergies.

The main idea of this deck is to generate mana quickly with cards like Ruby Medallion and Pyretic Ritual, while also drawing cards and setting up the combo with cards like Glimpse the Impossible and Ral, Monsoon Mage. Past in Flames allows you to replay key spells from your graveyard while also taking advantage of your storm count. The deck also includes Wish cards for additional flexibility and a win condition with cards like Grapeshot. Overall, the goal is to create a storm of spells to overwhelm your opponent and ultimately secure the win.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through various spells and abilities, using cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and Teferi, Time Raveler to limit the opponent's options. Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury serves as a win condition, while cards like Counterspell and Wrath of the Skies help maintain control of the battlefield. The deck also includes mana ramp and card draw options to ensure consistency and longevity in games. The inclusion of Isochron Scepter allows for repeated use of powerful instants, adding another layer of control to the deck.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly ramp up mana and overwhelm opponents with aggressive plays. It includes powerful creatures and spells to take advantage of the synergy between artifacts, providing a fast-paced and explosive gameplay style. With a mix of efficient removal, card draw, and disruption, the deck can maintain board presence while pressuring opponents, aiming to win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through a combination of counterspells, hand disruption, and removal spells. It aims to control the board and prevent the opponent from executing their strategy efficiently. The deck also includes powerful creatures like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Murktide Regent to apply pressure and close out the game once the opponent's resources have been depleted. Additionally, the deck includes card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Cling to Dust to maintain a steady stream of resources.
